framework: A path qualifies only when >=3 prominent, proven people in the field visibly share the capability, each with a resolving link — the pattern across standouts is the evidence, not market demand. Ranked by strength of that pattern. Curated editorial, not DOL-derived.

paths.path: Teach accounting and tax publicly at scale
paths.what_it_is: Publish free video, podcast, or newsletter content that teaches real accounting and technology skills to a broad audience, not only your own firm's clients.
paths.why_it_signals: It proves you can explain technical accounting work clearly enough that strangers trust and act on it — a communication and authority signal a client list alone can't show.

paths.path: Specialize in fraud investigation and make it public
paths.what_it_is: Build a forensic-accounting or fraud-examiner practice and turn real case narratives into public books, podcasts, or documentaries.
paths.why_it_signals: It proves you can turn sensitive, high-stakes casework into a public record of sound judgment — evidence you can be trusted with scrutiny, not just with numbers.

paths.path: Lead the firm's technology and automation practice
paths.what_it_is: Become the accountant who builds and evangelizes automation — no-code tools, Python, AI — for the back office, instead of only executing manual workflows.
paths.why_it_signals: It proves you can see past a manual process to redesign it — the initiative and technical range that gets someone promoted past routine bookkeeping.
